steps.expected: A–Z and # navigation links are rendered
steps.observed: A–Z and # links are visible in the glossary navigation row

steps.action: Extract glossary letter links and hrefs from DOM
steps.expected: Letters A–Z map to /glossary/term/{letter}; # maps to /glossary/term/sym
steps.observed: DOM export shows all 26 letters with expected /glossary/term/{letter} hrefs and # -> /glossary/term/sym

steps.action: Load /glossary and capture rendered term list
steps.expected: All glossary terms render in ascending order with term anchors and definitions
steps.observed: 8 terms rendered in ascending order (.htaccess, 404 Error, Algorithm, API, Boolean, Cache, Database, ut_glossary_admin_20260319_a_edit) with #term-* anchors and visible definitions

steps.action: Query SQLite glossary table for count and sorted terms
steps.observed: DB count=8 and sorted term list matches UI exactly

steps.expected: Only A terms display; A–Z bar remains visible
steps.observed: Rendered terms are Algorithm and API only; A–Z bar visible with 27 links including #

steps.action: Compare with DB WHERE lower(g_term) LIKE 'a%'
steps.expected: UI matches DB result and remains alphabetically sorted
steps.observed: DB aTerms=[Algorithm, API], matching UI order and membership

steps.expected: Only symbol/number-leading terms display; A–Z bar remains visible
steps.observed: Rendered terms are .htaccess and 404 Error only; A–Z bar visible with # link

steps.expected: UI term set matches DB symbol/number result
steps.observed: DB symbolTerms=[.htaccess, 404 Error], matching UI exactly

steps.action: Navigate to /glossary/term/e (no matching terms in DB)
steps.expected: Page renders cleanly with no term rows; A–Z bar remains present
steps.observed: Page rendered with termCount=0, no layout errors, and A–Z bar visible

steps.action: Use A–Z bar after empty state
steps.observed: Clicked 'A' link from empty E page and navigated to /glossary/term/a successfully

frictions.description: Glossary data changed during parallel validation (new admin-created term appeared mid-run), so /glossary evidence had to be re-captured to align UI and DB counts at one point in time.
frictions.resolution: Re-ran /glossary capture and DB query immediately afterward; final UI and DB both show 8 terms.

summary: Tested 6 assertions for Glossary Public: 6 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. A–Z navigation, full list rendering/count, letter and symbol filtering, empty-letter behavior, and title behavior all matched contract expectations.
